fullText:
JUST IN: AAA reports U.S. gas prices have hit $3.60 per gallon. 

Prices are expected to climb more before the end of the month. https://t.co/yBHubmmxj0

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Trump administration is considering suspending the 105 year old Jones Act to curb oil prices.

fullText: JUST IN: Saudi Aramco reportedly in talks to buy Ukrainian interceptor drones to protect its oil fields.
